title: Underground to Diamond Block
body:
Title: 💎 Diamond Depths – Stone & Deepslate Turn to Diamond! 💎

Description:
This texture pack transforms all stone-like blocks underground into glowing diamond blocks! Regular stone, deepslate, and similar materials will shine in bright blue, while dirt, wood, and other blocks remain unchanged. Perfect for those who want to explore a diamond-filled underground!

Features:
✔ Stone, deepslate & similar blocks turn into diamond blocks
✔ Dirt, wood, and other blocks remain unchanged
✔ Purely visual – no gameplay changes
✔ Compatible with most shaders & mods

Dive into an underground world of pure diamonds! 💎✨
